mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP A, MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND A.EXPIRATION_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.SOC = B.RATE_CD AND B.PAY_CL_CD = 'PP'

SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , DVC_OFW_AMNT , INST_ORGIN_AMNT , INST_MNTH_CNT , ENGG_MNTH_CNT , MODEL_NAME , MODEL_ID FROM ( SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , DVC_OFW_AMNT , INST_ORGIN_AMNT , INST_MNTH_CNT , ENGG_MNTH_CNT , MODEL_NAME , MODEL_ID , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY EVNT_TRTM_DT DESC) AS RNUM FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{svcCntrNo} AND APP_END_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) WHERE RNUM = 1
